title: Automatic creation of items (e.g. 3rd Wednesday of every month)
excerpt:
I would like to use an automated recipe to create an item, for example, on the third Wednesday of every month. 
With the current recipe, I can only set a fixed day every month or “Wednesday every 4 weeks”, etc., so could…

posts.author: Miyuki (Miyuki Matsushiba)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to use an automated recipe to create an item, for example, on the third Wednesday of every month.
With the current recipe, I can only set a fixed day every month or “Wednesday every 4 weeks”, etc., so could you please improve this?

posts.author: workflowboost (Bartosz @ Workflow Boost)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey! While this isn’t a native feature in monday yet, you can use the Advanced Time Triggers app. It introduces automation recipes for triggering actions on specific weekdays of the month, quarter, or year.
